landing.textStartHere: Plan your trip and enjoy the best tourist destinations in all of Bolivia!
landing.text1: From the infinite mirror of the Uyuni Salt Flats to the snow-capped peaks of the Andes, discover destinations that seem out of this world.
landing.text2: Immerse yourself in the historical richness of our colonial cities, ancient traditions, and the warmth of our people in every region.
landing.ctaRouteTitle: Plan routes to visit the places you want
landing.ctaRouteText: Build your travel route based on the places you wish to visit, set up an efficient itinerary, and just enjoy the journey.

signIn.tienesCuenta: Do you already have an account?

errorInputs.userNameMinLength: The username must be at least 5 characters long.
errorInputs.passwordMinLength: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
errorInputs.confirmPasswordContainSpace: The password confirmation cannot contain spaces.

inicioLogueado.elige_y_empieza: Select a department and start exploring the magic of each panorama that Bolivia, a country full of culture, has to offer.

wishlist.title: YOUR FAVORITE PLACES
wishlist.empty: You don't have any favorite places yet

modal.title: Remove from favorites?
modal.message: Are you sure you want to remove this place from your favorites list? This action cannot be undone.

department.textExploreCity: Explore the different tourist attractions of {{cityName}} or start putting together your itinerary to visit {{cityName}}.
department.textThereAreNoPlaces: There are no featured places for this department yet.
department.textThereAreNoReviews: There are no reviews for this place yet.
department.textGenericDescription: Detailed description of this tourist destination. Explore its beautiful views and rich history in {{cityName}}.

pinRedirection.title: Pin Redirection (PinRedirection)
pinRedirection.description: Enables automatic navigation when clicking on the markers of the tourist map.

autoCreateItinerary.title: Auto-create Itinerary (AutoCreateItinerary)
autoCreateItinerary.description: Allows the system to generate automatic travel suggestions based on selected places.

modal.title: Action required
modal.textError: Error saving the change on the server.
modal.textErrorFilter: All filter fields are required to perform an accurate search.

searchPlaces.textTryAnother: Try another department, place name, or address.

components.signUpSuccessTextMessage: The process has been completed successfully. Please log in to access the platform.

createItinerary.textSecondStep: 2. Select the places you want to visit
createItinerary.textFourthStep: 4. Set the dates for your itinerary
createItinerary.textSelectCity: Select a city to view its map.
createItinerary.textThereAreNoPlaces: There are no places available in this city.
createItinerary.textClickPin: Click on a pin to see the location
createItinerary.textSelectPlace: Select a location on the map to review its information and add it to your itinerary.
createItinerary.textHaventSelectPlaces: You haven't selected any places yet.
createItinerary.textHaventGeneratedItinerary: You haven't generated the itinerary yet.
